subject: fix(theme): update mask-icon.svg to use current theme colors
body:
Background was #0f172a (navy) instead of #0a0a0a (--color-background).
Accent paths were #38bdf8 (sky blue) instead of #d4d4d4 (--color-primary).
These were leftover from the old saturated theme.

Tags: theme, pwa, styling
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-centralization
Semver: patch
